# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FLOW-29 — Adaptive RAG Deep Research Engine
# Factory Registry: F1176–F1247 | Families 175–184
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

---

## OVERVIEW

FLOW-29 extends the ENGINE with an adaptive, self-learning retrieval layer. Every retrieval call is routed dynamically: vector / GraphRAG community query / hybrid fusion. Every run is traced. Every feedback score feeds a contextual bandit router that continuously improves model+prompt+flow selection under cost/latency/quality constraints.

The key insight: we do NOT replace existing RAG FABRIC (SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag)). We EXTEND it with a routing + learning layer that sits ABOVE the fabric interfaces and makes FREEDOM-configurable decisions at runtime.

---

## LAYER 0 EXTENSIONS — RAG FABRIC EXTENSIONS

The existing RAG FABRIC (SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag) — IRagService) gains 7 new strategies:

```
Existing strategies:  Split, FanOut, Tiered, Hybrid, Graph, Vector, Multi (7)
FLOW-29 adds:         AdaptiveBandit, GraphCommunity, SelfReflect, DomainProfile (4)
Total after FLOW-29:  11 IRagService strategies
```

All new strategies resolve through the SAME IRagService.SearchAsync() interface.
Admin selects strategy via FREEDOM config. Service code never changes.

---

## FAMILY 175 — Adaptive RAG Router (F1176–F1183)

**Purpose:** Route each incoming task to the optimal retrieval mode based on task classifier, budget preference, and bandit router policy.

| Factory | Interface                  | Fabric Resolution                                | Purpose                                          |
|---------|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| F1176   | IAdaptiveRagRouter         | RAG FABRIC (IRagService — AdaptiveBandit strategy) | Primary routing decision: vector/graph/hybrid   |
| F1177   | ITaskClassifier            | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — lightweight model) | Classify query intent: local/global/multi-hop   |
| F1178   | IRetrievalModeSelector     | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase config layer)       | Read FREEDOM config to select retrieval mode    |
| F1179   | IQueryRewriter             | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — fast model)       | Rewrite + decompose query before retrieval      |
| F1180   | IQueryDecomposer           | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — fast model)       | Split complex query into parallel sub-queries   |
| F1181   | IRetrievalModeRegistry     | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch) | Store/retrieve mode performance history        |
| F1182   | IRoutingPolicyReader       | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Redis cache)  | Fast-path routing policy lookup                 |
| F1183   | IRoutingAuditLogger        | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)      | Emit routing decision events for trace layer    |

**DNA Compliance:** All services extend MicroserviceBase. All doc ops via IDatabaseService. No typed models — dict[str, Any]. tenantId on every query.

---

## FAMILY 176 — Knowledge Graph & GraphRAG (F1184–F1191)

**Purpose:** Build, maintain, and query a GraphRAG knowledge graph with community hierarchy, community summaries, and multi-hop traversal.

| Factory | Interface                    | Fabric Resolution                                    | Purpose                                              |
|---------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| F1184   | IGraphRagService             | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Neo4j/Elasticsearch graph) | Execute GraphRAG community query          |
| F1185   | IKnowledgeGraphBuilder       | AI ENGINE FABRIC (AiDispatcher — multi-model extract) | Extract entities + relations from text corpus      |
| F1186   | ICommunityHierarchyManager   | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — graph provider)  | Partition graph into community hierarchy             |
| F1187   | ICommunitySummaryGenerator   | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — summarization model)  | Generate community summaries for global queries    |
| F1188   | IEntityDeduplicator          | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — embedding model)     | Deduplicate entities across documents                |
| F1189   | IGraphEditGate               | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — permissions layer)   | BFA-approved gate before any graph structure change |
| F1190   | IGraphIndexRebuildQueue      | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams DLQ)     | Async rebuild requests — never block query path     |
| F1191   | IDomainGraphProfileStore     | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)   | Tenant-scoped domain entity/relation type config    |

**Iron Rule:** IGraphIndexRebuildQueue is ASYNC. GraphRAG community rebuild NEVER blocks the synchronous query path. Violation = BUILD FAILURE.

---

## FAMILY 177 — Trace Capture & Observability (F1192–F1198)

**Purpose:** Capture every run end-to-end as OpenTelemetry spans over QUEUE FABRIC. Token counts, latency, cost, model used, retrieval mode, user feedback — all linked by trace ID.

| Factory | Interface                | Fabric Resolution                               | Purpose                                              |
|---------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| F1192   | ITraceSpanService        | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)    | Emit OTel-compatible trace spans for every step      |
| F1193   | ITokenCostTracker        | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)| Per-step token/cost accumulation by trace            |
| F1194   | ILatencyProfiler         | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — health layer)   | Sub-step latency recording without SDK lock-in       |
| F1195   | IRunSessionStore         | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)| Complete run session: config, results, scores       |
| F1196   | IFeedbackLinker          | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)| Link user feedback to exact run/config/trace        |
| F1197   | IObservabilityExporter   | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — outbox pattern)   | Export traces to external OTel collectors (config)  |
| F1198   | ICostBudgetEnforcer      | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — config layer)   | Enforce FREEDOM budget_cap — halt if exceeded       |

**FREEDOM Config Keys:** `trace.export.enabled`, `trace.export.endpoint`, `cost.budget_cap_per_run`, `cost.budget_cap_per_tenant_daily`

---

## FAMILY 178 — Bandit Router & Budget Control (F1199–F1205)

**Purpose:** Contextual bandit routing — dynamically choose (model, retrieval mode, prompt version, flow variant) under explicit budget preferences (Fast / Balanced / Thorough). Learns from bandit feedback (observed outcome + cost of chosen option).

| Factory | Interface                  | Fabric Resolution                                  | Purpose                                              |
|---------|----------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| F1199   | IBanditRouter              | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — routing model)      | Core multi-armed bandit: select best (model+mode+prompt) |
| F1200   | IBanditFeedbackStore       | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)  | Store bandit arm feedback: reward, cost, latency    |
| F1201   | IBudgetPreferenceReader    | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — config layer)       | Read user/tenant budget mode: Fast/Balanced/Thorough|
| F1202   | IBanditPolicyUpdater       | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Redis cache)    | Update routing policy weights from aggregated feedback|
| F1203   | IExplorationController     | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — config layer)       | Epsilon/UCB exploration rate (FREEDOM config)       |
| F1204   | IBanditAuditLog            | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)        | Emit routing decisions for BFA conflict detection   |
| F1205   | IMultiObjectiveScorer      | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — scoring model)       | Score runs on quality × cost × latency trade-offs  |

**MACHINE (invariant):** Bandit arm = (modelId, retrievalMode, promptVersionId, flowVariantId). Arms never collapsed. **FREEDOM (configurable):** exploration rate, reward window size, budget mode thresholds.

---

## FAMILY 179 — Evaluation & Quality Arbiter (F1206–F1212)

**Purpose:** AF-9 Judge extended with RAG-specific quality gates. Validates generated answers against retrieval faithfulness, context coverage, iron rules, and user-defined quality rubrics.

| Factory | Interface                   | Fabric Resolution                                   | Purpose                                              |
|---------|-----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| F1206   | IRetrievalFaithfulnessChecker | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — judge model)       | Verify answer is grounded in retrieved context      |
| F1207   | IContextCoverageScorer      | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — embedding model)    | Score how much relevant context was captured        |
| F1208   | IIronRuleValidator          | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — rules layer)        | DNA-1 to DNA-9 compliance on generated services    |
| F1209   | IQualityRubricStore         | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)  | Tenant-scoped quality rubric documents             |
| F1210   | IEvalResultPublisher        | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)        | Publish eval results to trace layer + BFA          |
| F1211   | IHallucinationDetector      | AI ENGINE FABRIC (AiDispatcher — multi-model)       | Cross-model consensus on factual claims            |
| F1212   | IQualityGateEnforcer        | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — config layer)       | Block promotion if quality score < threshold        |

**IRON RULE:** IQualityGateEnforcer can BLOCK promotion but NEVER silently downgrade. If gate fails → BuildFailure event emitted via QUEUE FABRIC.

## FAMILY 180 — Prompt Version Registry (F1213–F1219)

**Purpose:** Immutable prompt versioning. Promote by creating new version. Never edit production prompts in place. Controlled rollout with A/B evaluation gates.

| Factory | Interface                | Fabric Resolution                                  | Purpose                                              |
|---------|--------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| F1213   | IPromptVersionRegistry   | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch) | Store immutable prompt versions with metadata       |
| F1214   | IPromptVersionPromoter   | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)       | Emit promotion events through approval ladder       |
| F1215   | IPromptVariantTester     | AI ENGINE FABRIC (AiDispatcher — multi-model)      | A/B test candidate prompt against current champion  |
| F1216   | IPromptRollbackManager   | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch) | Safe rollback: switch pointer, not delete version   |
| F1217   | IPromptTaggingService    | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch) | Tag prompts: domain, task type, model affinity     |
| F1218   | IPromptInjectionBuilder  | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — context builder)   | Build structured XML prompt injection per run       |
| F1219   | IPromptAuditTrail        | QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService — Redis Streams)       | Emit every prompt selection to trace layer         |

**Promotion Ladder for Prompts:** DRAFT → CANDIDATE → TESTED → ACTIVE → ARCHIVED. Never skip steps. BFA validates before ACTIVE state.

---

## FAMILY 184 — Context Efficiency Monitor (F1242–F1247)

**Purpose:** Treat "context efficiency" (retrieved tokens per solved task) as a first-class metric alongside quality. Enforce optimization policies that penalize noisy retrieval.

| Factory | Interface                    | Fabric Resolution                                   | Purpose                                             |
|---------|------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| F1242   | IContextEfficiencyMonitor    | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — metrics layer)      | Track retrieved_token_count per step per run       |
| F1243   | INoiseRetrievalDetector      | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — scoring model)      | Detect low-relevance retrieved passages             |
| F1244   | IRerankerService             | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — rerank model)       | Rerank retrieved passages — reduce noise before gen |
| F1245   | IBudgetCapPolicyStore        | DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService — Elasticsearch)  | Store per-tenant token budget cap policies          |
| F1246   | IEfficiencyPenaltyCalculator | CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase — rules layer)        | Penalize runs that exceed token budget for quality  |
| F1247   | IContextPruner               | AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider — compression model)  | Compress/prune context when approaching budget cap  |

---

```
DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService) ← F1181, F1184, F1186, F1191, F1193, F1195,

                                      F1214, F1218, F1219, F1225, F1239
AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider)     ← F1177, F1179, F1180, F1185, F1187, F1188,
                                      F1199, F1205, F1211, F1215, F1218, F1222,
                                      F1230, F1234, F1240, F1243, F1244, F1247

                                      F1212, F1223, F1231, F1241, F1242, F1246
FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (IFlowOrchestrator) ← F1232
```

### Zero Direct Provider Imports

```python
# ✅ CORRECT — via fabric
 result = await _ragService.SearchAsync(query, strategy: "GraphCommunity", ctx)
 model = await _aiProvider.GenerateAsync(prompt, ctx)
# ❌ WRONG — direct import (BUILD FAILURE)
 neo4j = Neo4jClient(...)
 openai = OpenAIClient(...)
```

### DNA Compliance (all 9 patterns, all generated services)

| DNA Pattern | FLOW-29 Application |
|---|---|
| DNA-1 parse_document | All RAG results → dict[str, Any], never typed models |
| DNA-2 build_search_filter | RAG search filters skip empty fields automatically |
| DNA-3 DataProcessResult | Retrieval failures return DataProcessResult[T], never throw |
| DNA-4 MicroserviceBase | All 72 factory-backed services extend MicroserviceBase |
| DNA-5 Scope Isolation | tenantId on every graph query, every feedback store, every trace |
| DNA-6 DynamicController | No entity-specific controllers for RAG endpoints |
| DNA-7 Idempotency | Trace span emission is idempotent by traceId |
| DNA-8 Outbox | Bandit feedback persisted via outbox before acknowledgment |
| DNA-9 Backward Compat | FLOW-01–25 IRagService calls unchanged; new strategies are additive |

# FLOW-30 — PromptOps: Self-Learning Prompt Engineering Engine Extension
# Date: 2026-03-01 | Extends: Post-FLOW-29 State
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# FLOW-30 ENGINE ARCHITECTURE
## PromptOps — Self-Learning Prompt Engineering Engine Extension
## Date: 2026-03-01 | Status: FLOW-30 SPECIFICATION

---

## STARTING NUMBERS (FLOW-30)
> Assumes FLOW-26 through FLOW-29 consumed F1075–F1274, T389–T444, Families 154–184
> FLOW-30 begins at: F1248 / Family 185 / T468

```
Factory:         F1248    Family: 185
Task Type:       T468
BFA Rule:        CF-627
Stress Test:     ST-390
Skill:           SK-305
Design Decision: DD-298
Design Record:   DR-223
Template:        90
```

---

## FLOW-30 DOMAIN OVERVIEW

FLOW-30 adds **PromptOps** as a first-class engine capability. Every node execution in XIIGen
now produces a replayable trace. When judge scores fall below threshold or user feedback is
negative, an optimization sub-flow fires: it retrieves similar failure evidence from the
PromptOps RAG, runs a Critic→Editor→Guard pipeline, generates a candidate prompt version,
tests it on harvested eval suites, and canary-promotes it only if multiple gates pass.

Prompts are **immutable versioned assets** — the engine never silently mutates production
prompts. Promotion requires: eval suite pass + canary traffic gate + multi-judge agreement
(or judge + deterministic checks). Tenants can modify FREEDOM parts (style, domain hints)
but never MACHINE parts (schemas, safety rules, output format contracts).

---

## LAYER 0 — FABRIC USAGE MAP (FLOW-30)

All FLOW-30 services use ONLY existing fabric interfaces. No new fabrics are introduced.

| Fabric | Skills | How FLOW-30 uses it |
|--------|--------|---------------------|
| DATABASE FABRIC | SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase) | Prompt versions, traces, eval suites, policies — all in Elasticsearch |
| QUEUE FABRIC | SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue) | Optimization sub-flow trigger events, canary result events |
| AI ENGINE FABRIC | SK-385/SK-386 (IAiProvider/AiDispatcher) | Critic, Editor, Guard, Evaluator — all via IAiProvider.GenerateAsync() |
| RAG FABRIC | SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag) | PromptOps RAG (meta-memory): hybrid vector+graph over traces/patches |
| CORE FABRIC | SK-379 (MicroserviceBase) | MicroserviceBase inherited by every FLOW-30 service |
| FLOW ENGINE FABRIC | SK-391/SK-392 (FlowOrchestrator/RagStrategyRegistry) | Optimization loop as a JSON DAG in FlowOrchestrator |

---

## LAYER 1 — FACTORY REGISTRY (FLOW-30)

### FAMILY 185 — Prompt Asset Control Plane
> DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase) → Elasticsearch provider)

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1248 | IPromptTemplateService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Immutable prompt templates: taskType, nodeType, inputSchema, outputSchema, guardrails, templateText |
| F1249 | IPromptVersionService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Versioned prompt revisions with lineage: version, parentVersion, status, evalResultsSummary |
| F1250 | IPromptPolicyService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Routing policies: (taskType,nodeType,tenant,budgetMode) → allowed versions + exploration weights |
| F1251 | IPromptPatchService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Optimization patches with provenance: traceId, judgeVerdict, failureModes, suggestedEdits |
| F1252 | IJudgeRubricService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Versioned evaluation rubrics: criteria, scoring scale, fail conditions, required evidence |

Resolution contract:
  IPromptTemplateService  → CreateAsync(ctx) → DATABASE FABRIC → ES index: prompt_templates_{tenantId}
  IPromptVersionService   → CreateAsync(ctx) → DATABASE FABRIC → ES index: prompt_versions_{tenantId}
  IPromptPolicyService    → CreateAsync(ctx) → DATABASE FABRIC → ES index: prompt_policies_{tenantId}
  IPromptPatchService     → CreateAsync(ctx) → DATABASE FABRIC → ES index: prompt_patches_{tenantId}
  IJudgeRubricService     → CreateAsync(ctx) → DATABASE FABRIC → ES index: judge_rubrics_{tenantId}

DNA compliance: All documents stored as dict[str, Any] via parse_document (DNA-1).
build_search_filter skips empty fields (DNA-2). All responses return DataProcessResult[T] (DNA-3).
Scope isolation: tenantId on every query (DNA-5).

---

### FAMILY 186 — PromptOps RAG (Meta-Memory)
> RAG FABRIC (SK-389 (HybridRagStrategy)) + DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase))
> CRITICAL: Separate index space from Operational RAG — no cross-contamination

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1253 | IPromptOpsRagService | RAG FABRIC (00b → Hybrid strategy) | Hybrid vector+graph retrieval over prompt traces, patches, failure summaries |
| F1254 | ITraceIndexService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Indexes run traces for PromptOps learning: promptVersion, retrievalMode, model, cost, judgeResult |
| F1255 | IEvalCaseService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Eval cases harvested from failures: inputs, expectedConstraints, scoringRubricRef, failureLabels |
| F1256 | IEvalSuiteService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Eval suites per (taskType,nodeType,tenant): cases[], passThresholds, lastRunResult |

PromptOps RAG retrieval strategy:
  IRagService.SearchAsync(query, strategy: "Hybrid") →
    vector-search: "similar trace / similar failure explanation"
    graph-search:  "common failure patterns across traces for this taskType"
    merge: local similarity UNION global pattern summaries

IRON RULE: promptops_rag_{tenantId} MUST NOT overlap with operational_rag_{tenantId}.
Any query crossing index boundaries = BUILD FAILURE.

---

### FAMILY 187 — Prompt Optimization Engine
> AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385/SK-386 (IAiProvider/AiDispatcher) → IAiProvider + AiDispatcher)

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1257 | IPromptCriticService | AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher) → multi-model) | Analyzes judge verdict + trace → failureModes[], missingConstraints[], ambiguityPoints[] |
| F1258 | IPromptEditorService | AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher) → primary model) | Generates concrete prompt edits from critique → candidate PromptVersion text + changeSummary |
| F1259 | IPromptGuardService | AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider) → validator) | Validates candidate against PromptPolicy: no MACHINE violation, no schema break, no safety regression |
| F1260 | ICandidateEvaluatorService | AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher) → judge) | Runs candidate on EvalSuite → quality delta, groundedness delta, cost delta vs active version |

AF Station Mapping for Optimization Sub-Flow:
  AF-3 (Prompt Library) → retrieves IPromptVersionService (F1249) → active version for task
  AF-4 (RAG Context)    → retrieves IPromptOpsRagService (F1253) → similar failures + successful patches
  AF-5 (Multi-model)    → runs IPromptCriticService (F1257) across Claude+GPT-4+Gemini in parallel
  AF-6 (Code Review)    → IPromptEditorService (F1258) proposes edits
  AF-7 (Compliance)     → IPromptGuardService (F1259) validates no MACHINE violation
  AF-9 (Judge)          → ICandidateEvaluatorService (F1260) scores quality delta
  AF-11 (Feedback)      → IPromptPatchService (F1251) stores patch with full provenance

---

### FAMILY 188 — Canary Promotion Pipeline
> QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) + DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase))

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1261 | ICanaryAssignmentService | QUEUE FABRIC (04 → Redis Streams) | Deterministic tenant cohort assignment for canary rollout |
| F1262 | IPromotionDecisionService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Stores promotion verdicts: candidateId, verdict, evidence, promotedBy, promotedAt |
| F1263 | IPromptRoutingService | AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher)) | Bandit-based explore/exploit routing: Thompson sampling over prompt version reward history |
| F1264 | IRollbackService | QUEUE FABRIC (04 → Redis Streams) | Triggers rollback event on canary regression; archives failed candidate |

Promotion Ladder (FLOW-30):
  CANDIDATE → [eval suite pass] → CANARY → [canary traffic gate] → ACTIVE → [deprecated on next]
  Any step can → REJECTED (archived with failure reason + evidence bundle)

IRON RULES:
  CANDIDATE requires: parent version lineage + eval suite assigned
  CANARY requires: eval suite pass + IPromptGuardService clearance
  ACTIVE requires: canary pass + multi-judge agreement OR judge + deterministic schema check
  Single-model judge verdict ALONE cannot promote to ACTIVE = BUILD FAILURE

---

### FAMILY 189 — PromptOps Observability
> DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase) → Elasticsearch)

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1265 | IPromptTraceService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Per-node trace: promptVersionId, ragProfileId, modelId, tokens, latencyMs, judgeScore |
| F1266 | IPromptMetricsService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Aggregate metrics per (taskType, promptVersion, tenant, budgetMode) |
| F1267 | IPromptAuditService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Immutable audit log: all promotions, rollbacks, policy changes — append-only |

---

### FAMILY 190 — Multi-Tenant PromptOps Safety
> CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) + DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase))

| Factory | Interface | Fabric Resolution | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| F1268 | ITenantPromptProfileService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Tenant-specific FREEDOM overrides: style, verbosity, domain hints |
| F1269 | ICrossTenantLearningService | DATABASE FABRIC (ES) | Global learning aggregation from non-sensitive traces across tenants |
| F1270 | IPromptScopeGuardService | CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) | Enforces MACHINE/FREEDOM boundary — MACHINE parts are read-only per tenant |

Multi-tenant safety contract:
  FREEDOM (tenant can change): style, verbosity, domain hints, language, tone
  MACHINE (immutable per tenant): outputSchema, inputSchema, guardrails, safety constraints
  IPromptScopeGuardService.ValidateOverride(tenantId, field, value) → DataProcessResult[bool]
    returns Failure if field is MACHINE-classified

---

## DESIGN DECISIONS (FLOW-30)

DD-298: PromptOps RAG MUST be separate from Operational RAG
  Separate ES index namespaces; IPromptScopeGuardService validates index prefix before every write.
  Cross-contamination risks: prompt injection, PII leakage, retrieval poisoning.

DD-299: Promotion requires multi-gate (not single judge)
  ACTIVE promotion: eval suite pass AND canary gate AND (multi-judge agreement OR judge+deterministic check).
  Single-gate is insufficient — LLM-as-judge has documented bias/inconsistency.

DD-300: Prompt Versions are immutable after creation
  No UPDATE on text field. Only status transitions: candidate→canary→active→deprecated.
  IPromptVersionService.UpdateAsync() rejects text changes with DataProcessResult.Failure.

DD-301: Bandit routing for explore/exploit (cap: 3 active variants per context)
  IPromptRoutingService uses Thompson sampling over (promptVersionId, qualityReward, costReward).
  Avoids prompt variant sprawl. Auto-prune candidates failing eval suites.

DD-302: Cross-tenant learning requires non-sensitive gate
  ICrossTenantLearningService only aggregates traces where sensitivityClass = "public" or "internal-aggregated".

---

## DESIGN RECORDS (FLOW-30)

DR-223: ES Index Structure
  prompt_templates_{tenantId}    prompt_versions_{tenantId}    prompt_policies_{tenantId}
  prompt_patches_{tenantId}      judge_rubrics_{tenantId}      prompt_traces_{tenantId}
  prompt_metrics_{tenantId}      prompt_audit_{tenantId}       promptops_rag_{tenantId}
  eval_cases_{tenantId}          eval_suites_{tenantId}        canary_assignments_{tenantId}
  promotion_decisions_{tenantId} tenant_prompt_profiles_{tenantId}

DR-224: Optimization Sub-Flow Trigger Conditions
  judgeScore < policy.minAcceptableScore (default 0.70)
  userFeedback = "negative" AND feedbackText.length > 0
  costPerToken > policy.budgetCeiling AND qualityScore < minAcceptableScore + 0.10
  consecutiveSubthresholdRuns >= 3

DR-225: Backward Compatibility
  FLOW-30 is opt-in overlay: promptOpsEnabled: true in flow config.
  F1–F1274, T1–T444, CF-1–CF-569, SK-1–SK-260 — all unchanged.

---

## BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY STATEMENT

All previously defined artifacts (F1–F1274, T1–T444, CF-1–CF-569, SK-1–SK-260) are unchanged.
FLOW-30 is additive only. PromptOps activates per (taskType, nodeType) via config flag.

## FAMILY 154 — FIGMA INGESTION ZONE
### Purpose: Extract all design data from Figma (REST + plugin), enforcing rate limits and caching.

```
F1271 : IFigmaApiClientService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (cache layer) + QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (rate-limit token bucket)
  CREATES:  Authenticated Figma REST sessions; manages API key rotation; returns raw JSON node tree per file version
  METHODS:  GetFileAsync(fileKey, version?) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            GetFileNodesAsync(fileKey, nodeIds[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            GetImagesAsync(fileKey, nodeIds[], format) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Rate limit enforcement, version tracking, JSON node tree structure
  FREEDOM:  API key selection, max-concurrent-requests, cache TTL
  DNA:      parse_document (all responses are dict[str, Any]), MicroserviceBase, DataProcessResult

F1272 : IFigmaPluginExtractorService
  FABRIC:   QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (plugin→server event pipeline)
  CREATES:  Plugin-side extractor that captures prototype reactions, auto-layout, variables not in REST API
  METHODS:  ExtractPrototypeReactionsAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            ExtractLocalVariablesAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Reaction trigger/action schema, variable resolution
  FREEDOM:  Plugin polling interval, extraction depth
  DNA:      parse_document, MicroserviceBase, Scope Isolation (tenantId on all plugin events)

F1273 : IFigmaNodeParserService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (parsed node store)
  CREATES:  Normalizes raw Figma JSON into canonical node tree with typed attributes preserved as Dictionary
  METHODS:  ParseNodeTreeAsync(rawJson) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            ExtractTextLayersAsync(nodeTree) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Node type normalization (FRAME, COMPONENT, INSTANCE, TEXT, RECTANGLE…), hierarchy resolution
  FREEDOM:  Node depth limit, text-layer filtering rules
  DNA:      parse_document (no typed NodeModel classes), DataProcessResult

F1274 : IFigmaImageRendererService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher)) → vision model input preparation; DATABASE FABRIC → image URL cache
  CREATES:  Renders specific frames to images for multimodal AI input; manages image URL lifecycle
  METHODS:  RenderFrameAsync(fileKey, frameId, scale) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            RenderBatchAsync(fileKey, frameIds[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Image format (PNG/SVG), scale factor, URL expiry handling
  FREEDOM:  Max resolution, batch size, storage provider (S3/Azure Blob)
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation

F1275 : IFigmaComponentCatalogService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (component registry index)
  CREATES:  Ingests published component/style library metadata; maps component IDs to canonical design-system names
  METHODS:  GetPublishedComponentsAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            GetStylesAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            ResolveComponentIdentityAsync(instanceNodeId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Component ID → main component linkage, variant properties schema
  FREEDOM:  Which libraries to index, variant depth
  DNA:      parse_document, build_search_filter (empty-field skip on style queries)

F1276 : IDesignTokenResolverService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (token index)
  CREATES:  Resolves Figma variables/tokens to semantic meaning (color roles, spacing scales, typography)
  METHODS:  ResolveTokenAsync(variableId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            GetTokenMapAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Token → semantic role mapping (primary-color, spacing-md, heading-1…)
  FREEDOM:  Token taxonomy, alias resolution depth
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1277 : IDesignVersionTrackerService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (version history index)
  CREATES:  Tracks Figma file versions; triggers incremental re-ingestion only on change; prevents redundant scraping
  METHODS:  GetCurrentVersionAsync(fileKey) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            HasChangedSinceAsync(fileKey, lastVersion) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            RecordIngestionAsync(fileKey, version, result) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Version comparison, change detection algorithm
  FREEDOM:  Polling interval, full-rescan threshold
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation, build_search_filter

F1278 : IFigmaRateLimitGuardService
  FABRIC:   QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (token-bucket per tenant per API tier)
  CREATES:  Enforces Figma API rate limits per seat type and endpoint tier; queues excess requests; never drops silently
  METHODS:  AcquireTokenAsync(endpointTier, tenantId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            GetCurrentBudgetAsync(tenantId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Tier definitions (REST-v1, REST-v2, Images), hard limits per plan
  FREEDOM:  Burst allowance, back-pressure strategy (queue vs reject)
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, MicroserviceBase, Scope Isolation
```

## FAMILY 155 — DESIGNIR PROCESSING ZONE
### Purpose: Transform normalized node tree into DesignIR — the stable machine-readable structural representation.

```

F1280 : IUIControlDetectorService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (ui_controls index)
  CREATES:  Detects normalized control types from node structure (button/input/table/card/filter/modal/tab/form-field)

  MACHINE:  Control taxonomy, detection heuristics (size+position+text+component-name patterns)

F1281 : ILayoutSemanticAnalyzerService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (layout_semantics index)

F1282 : IComponentSignatureBuilderService

F1283 : IScreenFingerprintBuilderService

  METHODS:  BuildFingerprintAsync(screenId, features) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  METHODS:  ExtractInteractionsAsync(screenId, reactions[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (design_ir index — master DesignIR document per file)
  CREATES:  Assembles all per-screen artifacts into master DesignIR: screens[], components[], designTokens, screenMap, prototypeLinks
  METHODS:  AssembleDesignIRAsync(fileKey, version) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation, build_search_filter

  CREATES:  Validates DesignIR completeness: every screen has features, every component has identity, no orphaned refs
```

## FAMILY 156 — AI SEMANTIC EXTRACTION ZONE
### Purpose: Use multimodal AI (image + structured JSON) to produce ScreenSemanticsIR per screen.

```
F1287 : IScreenSemanticsOrchestratorService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher)) → AiDispatcher (multi-model parallel: Claude Vision + GPT-4o) + QUEUE FABRIC → Redis Streams (per-screen tasks)
  CREATES:  Orchestrates per-screen semantic extraction pipeline: render → prompt build → AI call → parse → validate → store
  METHODS:  ExtractSemanticsAsync(screenId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  FREEDOM:  Which models compete, max-tokens, temperature
  DNA:      MicroserviceBase, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation

F1288 : IMultimodalPromptBuilderService
  FABRIC:   RAG FABRIC (SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag)) → IRagService (retrieves module signatures + known archetype examples as context)
  CREATES:  Builds structured multimodal prompt: pruned node tree JSON + text layers + component names + rendered image + RAG-retrieved module context
  METHODS:  BuildPromptAsync(screenId, imageUrl, nodeTree, ragContext) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Prompt schema, node tree pruning algorithm (remove decoration nodes), RAG context injection template
  FREEDOM:  Prompt template variant (detail level), RAG strategy (Vector vs Hybrid)
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1289 : IScreenArchetypeClassifierService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → IAiProvider; DATABASE FABRIC → Elasticsearch (archetype_classifications index)

  METHODS:  ClassifyArchetypeAsync(screenId, semanticsRaw) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Archetype taxonomy, confidence threshold
  FREEDOM:  Custom archetypes per project, confidence floor
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1290 : IUIEntityExtractorService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → IAiProvider; DATABASE FABRIC → Elasticsearch (ui_entities index)
  CREATES:  Extracts data entities visible on screen (Product, Order, User, Post, Ticket, Invoice…) with field evidence

  MACHINE:  Entity taxonomy, field extraction heuristics

  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation (tenantId on entity index)

F1291 : IActionPatternDetectorService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → IAiProvider; DATABASE FABRIC → Elasticsearch (action_patterns index)
  CREATES:  Detects user actions from screen (create/edit/search/pay/chat/book/filter/export/cancel/refund…)

  FREEDOM:  Custom action definitions, ambiguity resolution

F1292 : IEvidenceMapBuilderService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (evidence_maps index)
  CREATES:  For every AI-inferred claim (module/action/entity), builds evidence record: {nodeId, textLayer, componentName, boundingBoxCue}

F1293 : IIntentSummaryGeneratorService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → IAiProvider; DATABASE FABRIC → Elasticsearch (intent_summaries index)

F1294 : ISemanticIRValidatorService
```

```
  METHODS:  StoreDependencyAsync(sourceModule, targetModule, dependencyType) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  CREATES:  Multi-hop graph retrieval: vector similarity → graph traversal → constraint pull (module signatures, dependencies)
  METHODS:  RetrieveAsync(screenEmbedding, candidateModules[], hops) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation
```

## FAMILY 159 — MODULE MAPPING ZONE

```

  METHODS:  GetModuleMatrixAsync(systemType?) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

  METHODS:  ResolveModuleCandidatesAsync(screenId, semanticsIR) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]

```

```
  MACHINE:  Flow completeness rules, mandatory screen pairs
  FREEDOM:  Completeness policy strictness
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1326 : IFlowGapAnalyzerService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (flow_gaps index); QUEUE FABRIC → Redis Streams (gap-found events)
  CREATES:  Analyzes prototype flow graph for broken flows: navigation paths that terminate without resolution
  METHODS:  AnalyzeFlowGapsAsync(fileKey, navigationFlowGraph) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Flow termination rules, dead-end detection
  FREEDOM:  Severity thresholds, which terminations are acceptable
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation

F1327 : IGapReportBuilderService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (gap_reports_final index); QUEUE FABRIC → Redis Streams (report-ready event)
  CREATES:  Compiles all gap findings into unified gap report with prioritized action list
  METHODS:  BuildReportAsync(fileKey, moduleGaps[], screenGaps[], flowGaps[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Report schema, priority ordering algorithm
  FREEDOM:  Report format, consumer targets (admin UI, webhook, email)
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1328 : IStubGenerationOrchestratorService
  FABRIC:   AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-386 (AiDispatcher)) → AiDispatcher (stub code generation); FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry)) → IFlowOrchestrator (stub flow injection)
  CREATES:  For critical gaps, generates Genie DNA compliant stubs: config doc stubs for missing modules; flow node stubs for missing screens
  METHODS:  GenerateStubsAsync(fileKey, criticalGaps[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Stub template library per module type, DNA compliance rules
  FREEDOM:  Which gaps trigger auto-stub vs human review
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, MicroserviceBase, DynamicController
```

## FAMILY 162 — LEARNING LOOP ZONE
### Purpose: Feedback correction, exemplar injection, benchmark management, quality gates.

```
F1329 : IFeedbackCorrectionStoreService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (feedback_corrections index); QUEUE FABRIC → Redis Streams (correction events)
  CREATES:  Stores user corrections: before/after labels, model output, judge verdict, evidence used
  METHODS:  StoreCorrectionAsync(screenId, before, after, reason, userId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Correction schema, correction type taxonomy: WRONG_ARCHETYPE/WRONG_MODULE/WRONG_SYSTEM_TYPE/MISSING_GAP
  FREEDOM:  Correction validation (human review required vs auto-apply)
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation, build_search_filter

F1330 : INegativeExemplarInjectorService
  FABRIC:   RAG FABRIC (SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag)) → IRagService (stores as negative exemplar in retrieval corpus)
  CREATES:  Injects negative corrections as anti-examples into RAG corpus so future retrievals avoid same mistakes
  METHODS:  InjectNegativeExemplarAsync(correction) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Exemplar injection schema, anti-example tagging
  FREEDOM:  Injection threshold (min corrections before injection), exemplar TTL
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1331 : IPositiveExemplarInjectorService
  FABRIC:   RAG FABRIC (SK-388/SK-389 (IRagService/HybridRag)) → IRagService (stores as positive exemplar)
  CREATES:  Injects confirmed-correct mappings as positive exemplars for future retrieval reinforcement
  METHODS:  InjectPositiveExemplarAsync(screenId, confirmedMapping) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Positive exemplar schema, confidence reinforcement algorithm
  FREEDOM:  Injection trigger policy, weight boost magnitude
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult

F1332 : ILabelBenchmarkManagerService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (label_benchmark index)
  CREATES:  Maintains labeled benchmark set of screens (known ground truth) for continuous classification evaluation
  METHODS:  AddBenchmarkSampleAsync(screenId, groundTruthMapping) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
            RunBenchmarkAsync() → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Benchmark evaluation metrics: accuracy, precision/recall per module, calibration
  FREEDOM:  Benchmark size, evaluation schedule
  DNA:      parse_document, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation

F1333 : ILearningLoopOrchestratorService
  FABRIC:   QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (learning loop events); AI ENGINE FABRIC → AiDispatcher (re-scoring)
  CREATES:  Orchestrates full learning loop: correction → exemplar injection → benchmark run → metric tracking → alert if accuracy drops
  METHODS:  RunLearningCycleAsync(tenantId) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Loop cadence, accuracy drop threshold for alert
  FREEDOM:  Loop frequency, alert channels
  DNA:      MicroserviceBase, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation

F1334 : IEvidenceCoverageGateService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (gate_results index)
  CREATES:  Gate: every module/action/entity claim must reference ≥1 evidence item (nodeId/text/component name). Fails build if not met.
  METHODS:  EvaluateAsync(screenId, semanticsIR) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Minimum evidence count per claim type
  FREEDOM:  Evidence threshold per severity tier
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, MicroserviceBase

F1335 : ICrossScreenConsistencyGateService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (consistency_gate_results index)
  CREATES:  Gate: entities must be consistent across screens (same Order entity = same fields + naming). Fires on contradiction.
  METHODS:  EvaluateAsync(fileKey, allEntityMaps[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Consistency rules, contradiction detection algorithm
  FREEDOM:  Tolerance for minor naming variation, severity thresholds
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, MicroserviceBase, build_search_filter

F1336 : IModuleDependencyConstraintGateService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (dependency_gate_results index)
  CREATES:  Gate: if Cart exists, Checkout must exist or explicitly marked cart-only. Applies all dependency constraint checks.
  METHODS:  EvaluateAsync(fileKey, resolvedModules[]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Dependency constraint rules from module matrix
  FREEDOM:  Exemption declarations
  DNA:      DataProcessResult

F1337 : IGenieDNAModuleGateService
  FABRIC:   DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (dna_gate_results index)
  CREATES:  Gate: no screen mapping results in hardcoded site-type values; everything must flow into module config docs
  METHODS:  EvaluateAsync(fileKey, wiringPlan) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  DNA rules for design intelligence layer
  FREEDOM:  Strictness level
  DNA:      DataProcessResult, MicroserviceBase

F1338 : IJudgeOrchestrator31Service
  FABRIC:   QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (judgment pipeline); AI ENGINE FABRIC → IAiProvider (AF-9 Judge)
  CREATES:  Orchestrates all 4 quality gates in sequence (Evidence → Consistency → Dependency → DNA); aggregates verdicts; promotes or blocks
  METHODS:  RunJudgmentAsync(fileKey, pipeline) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  MACHINE:  Gate execution order, verdict aggregation, promotion decision
  FREEDOM:  Gate bypass policy for specific warning types
  DNA:      MicroserviceBase, DataProcessResult, Scope Isolation
```

All previously defined artifacts (F1–F1270, T1–T488, CF-1–CF-651, SK-1–SK-314) are unchanged.

Existing FLOW-01 through FLOW-30 flows continue to operate without modification.

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FLOW-32: SHARABLE FLOWS & RAG TEMPLATE MARKETPLACE
# Added: 2026-03-03 | F1339-F1418, Families 200-210
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# FLOW-32: SHARABLE FLOWS & RAG TEMPLATE MARKETPLACE — ENGINE ARCHITECTURE EXTENSION
## Date: 2026-03-03 | Factories: F1339-F1418 | Families: 200-210
## Extends: ENGINE_ARCHITECTURE_MERGED.md (FLOW-01 through FLOW-31)

---

## FLOW-32 OVERVIEW

FLOW-32 extends the XIIGen engine with the capability to let tenants **publish, share, sell, and install flow + RAG templates** as marketplace products while keeping sensitive tenant data isolated by design. The engine generates:
- Template package registry (versioned, immutable, semver)
- DLP/secrets scanning and export allowlist enforcement
- Marketplace listing, search, ratings, and discovery
- Installation service (Snapshot / Linked / Fork modes)
- Version upgrade and migration engine with BFA revalidation
- RAG blueprint packaging (share HOW to retrieve, not WHAT)
- Affiliate revenue share engine with metering attribution
- Template analytics, quality metrics, and fraud detection
- Sandbox execution with synthetic data and connector stubs
- Data pack export/import with PII scanning and provenance
- Supply chain security (signing, SBOM, SLSA attestations)

ALL services are generated by the engine on top of existing FABRIC interfaces.
No service imports a provider SDK directly.

---

# SECTION 1 — FACTORY FAMILIES (F1339–F1418)

## FAMILY 200: Template Package Registry (F1339–F1347)
**Purpose:** Manage template package lifecycle — draft, publish, version, deprecate. All versions immutable once published.

### F1339: ITemplatePackageRegistryService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplatePackageRegistryService
PURPOSE:    Core CRUD for template packages with immutable versioning
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  CreateDraftAsync(package: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  PublishVersionAsync(packageId: str, version: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  GetPackageAsync(packageId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  SearchPackagesAsync(filters: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
  DeprecateVersionAsync(packageId: str, semver: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM:
  defaultVisibility: dropdown (public | unlisted | private)
  maxVersionsPerPackage: number (5-100)
  autoDeprecateOldVersions: bool
MACHINE:
  tenantId required on every call (DNA-5)
  DataProcessResult[T] on all methods (DNA-3)
  parse_document for all inputs (DNA-1)
  Immutable versions — never overwrite published (IRON RULE)
  Semver validation enforced on publish
```

### F1340: ITemplateManifestService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateManifestService
PURPOSE:    Parse, validate, and store template manifests (dependencies, parameters, permissions)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  ValidateManifestAsync(manifest: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[ValidationResult]
  StoreManifestAsync(packageId: str, manifest: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  ResolveDependenciesAsync(manifest: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM:
  requiredManifestFields: list (configurable per marketplace tier)
  dependencyResolutionStrategy: dropdown (strict | relaxed)
MACHINE:
  JSON schema validation on manifest (non-negotiable)
  All declared factories must exist in factory registry
```

### F1341: ITemplateSemverService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateSemverService
PURPOSE:    Enforce semver rules, compute compatibility, manage version chains
FABRIC:     CORE FABRIC (MicroserviceBase, SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
METHODS:
  ValidateSemverAsync(version: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  ComputeCompatibilityAsync(fromVersion: str, toVersion: str) → DataProcessResult[CompatibilityLevel]
  GetVersionChainAsync(packageId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM:
  allowPreReleaseVersions: bool
  enforceStrictSemver: bool (default: true)
MACHINE:
  Major version = backward-incompatible (always)
  Released versions MUST NOT be modified
```

### F1342: ITemplateArtifactStorageService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateArtifactStorageService
PURPOSE:    Store and retrieve template artifact bundles (flow DAGs, prompts, policies, schemas)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  StoreArtifactAsync(packageVersionId: str, artifact: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  GetArtifactAsync(artifactId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  ComputeHashAsync(artifact: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[str]
FREEDOM:
  compressionEnabled: bool
  maxArtifactSizeBytes: number
MACHINE:
  Content-addressable storage (hash = identity)
  Artifacts immutable once stored
```

### F1343: ITemplateParameterSchemaService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateParameterSchemaService
PURPOSE:    Manage typed parameter definitions (str, enum, number, secret_ref, connection_ref, dataset_ref)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  DefineParametersAsync(templateVersionId: str, params: List<dict[str, Any]>, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  ValidateBindingsAsync(templateVersionId: str, bindings: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[ValidationResult]
  GetParameterSchemaAsync(templateVersionId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM:
  allowCustomParameterTypes: bool
  validationStrictness: dropdown (warn | error)
MACHINE:
  secret_ref and connection_ref NEVER contain actual values (references only)
  Required parameters must have no default OR explicit default
```

### F1344: ITemplateUpgradePolicyService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateUpgradePolicyService
PURPOSE:    Define and enforce upgrade policies (notify-only, auto-patch, auto-minor, forced-security)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  SetUpgradePolicyAsync(packageId: str, policy: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  GetUpgradePolicyAsync(packageId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  EvaluateUpgradeEligibilityAsync(installationId: str, newVersion: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM:
  defaultUpgradePolicy: dropdown (manual | auto_patch | auto_minor)
  forcedSecurityPatchEnabled: bool (default: true)
MACHINE:
  Forced security patches bypass normal approval (IRON RULE for critical CVEs)
  Policy changes logged in audit trail
```

### F1345: ITemplateLicensingService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateLicensingService
PURPOSE:    Manage licensing and pricing policies (free, paid-download, usage-based, revenue-share)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  SetLicenseAsync(packageId: str, license: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  GetLicenseAsync(packageId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  CheckEntitlementAsync(tenantId: str, packageId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM:
  pricingModel: dropdown (free | one_time | per_install | per_run | revenue_share | subscription)
  sharePercent: number (0-50)
  trialRunsAllowed: number (0-100)
MACHINE:
  Revenue share capped at 50% (platform minimum retention)
  License terms immutable per version
```

### F1346: ITemplateVisibilityService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateVisibilityService
PURPOSE:    Control template visibility (public/unlisted/private), tenant allowlists, geo restrictions
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch provider
METHODS:
  SetVisibilityAsync(packageId: str, visibility: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  CheckAccessAsync(viewerTenantId: str, packageId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM:
  defaultVisibility: dropdown (public | unlisted | private)
  geoRestrictionEnabled: bool
MACHINE:
  Private packages visible ONLY to owner + allowlisted tenants
  Visibility changes audited
```

### F1347: ITemplateDeprecationService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateDeprecationService
PURPOSE:    Manage end-of-life for template versions (deprecation notices, sunset dates, migration nudges)
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService, SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams
METHODS:
  DeprecateVersionAsync(packageId: str, semver: str, sunsetDate: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  NotifyInstallationsAsync(packageId: str, semver: str) → DataProcessResult[int]
FREEDOM:
  sunsetGracePeriodDays: number (30-365)
  autoNotifyOnDeprecation: bool (default: true)
MACHINE:
  Deprecated versions runnable until sunset date
  Forced migration only for security-critical issues
```

## FAMILY 201: Template Sanitizer & DLP Scanner (F1348–F1355)
**Purpose:** Scan packages for secrets, PII, tenant data leakage. Enforce export allowlist.

### F1348: ITemplateSanitizerService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateSanitizerService
PURPOSE:    Orchestrate full sanitization pipeline
FABRIC:     AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider, SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → LLM provider
METHODS:
  SanitizePackageAsync(packageId: str, artifacts: List<dict[str, Any]>, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[SanitizationReport]
  GetScanResultAsync(scanId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: scanSensitivity: dropdown (low|medium|high), autoRejectOnFail: bool, customBlockPatterns: list
MACHINE: Secrets detection non-negotiable (IRON RULE). PII uses AI ENGINE FABRIC. Scan results immutable.
```

### F1349: ISecretsDetectorService
```
INTERFACE:  ISecretsDetectorService
PURPOSE:    Detect API keys, tokens, passwords, connection strings
FABRIC:     CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process + AI ENGINE FABRIC for edge cases
METHODS:
  ScanForSecretsAsync(content: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: detectionRuleSet: dropdown (standard|strict|custom), falsePositiveThreshold: number
MACHINE: Detected secrets = IMMEDIATE rejection. No false-negative tolerance for known patterns.
```

### F1350: IExportAllowlistService
```
INTERFACE:  IExportAllowlistService
PURPOSE:    Maintain allowlist of artifact types permitted in packages
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  CheckAllowlistAsync(artifactType: str, content: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  GetAllowlistAsync() → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: customAllowlistExtensions: list
MACHINE: Default allow: flow.json, prompts/*, policies/*, schemas/*. Block: *.env, *.key, credentials/*, data/*, embeddings/*.
```

### F1351: IPiiScannerService
```
INTERFACE:  IPiiScannerService
PURPOSE:    Detect PII in template content using AI
FABRIC:     AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider, SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → LLM provider
METHODS:
  ScanForPiiAsync(content: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: piiCategories: multi-select, anonymizationMode: dropdown (redact|mask|synthetic_replace)
MACHINE: All detected PII logged for audit. Uses AI-based detection — not pattern matching alone.
```

### F1352: IDataClassificationService
```
INTERFACE:  IDataClassificationService
PURPOSE:    Label artifacts with data classification (public/internal/confidential/restricted)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  ClassifyArtifactAsync(artifact: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  EnforceClassificationAsync(packageId: str, requiredLevel: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: classificationLevels: list, defaultClassification: dropdown
MACHINE: Restricted artifacts NEVER in packages (IRON RULE). Classification propagates to derived artifacts.
```

### F1353: ITemplateReviewService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateReviewService
PURPOSE:    Human review workflow for template submissions
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (IQueueService, SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams
METHODS:
  SubmitForReviewAsync(packageId: str, semver: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  ReviewAsync(reviewId: str, decision: dict[str, Any], reviewerTenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: autoApproveThreshold: number, requireHumanReview: bool, maxReviewDays: number
MACHINE: Review decisions are immutable audit records. Rejected = must resubmit.
```

### F1354: IScanResultStorageService
```
INTERFACE:  IScanResultStorageService
PURPOSE:    Store immutable scan results for compliance audit trail
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (IDatabaseService, SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  StoreScanResultAsync(scanResult: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  GetScanHistoryAsync(packageId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: retentionDays: number (90-3650)
MACHINE: Scan results immutable — append only. Linked to package version.
```

### F1355: ITenantDataLeakDetectorService
```
INTERFACE:  ITenantDataLeakDetectorService
PURPOSE:    Detect cross-tenant data leakage patterns
FABRIC:     AI ENGINE FABRIC (IAiProvider, SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → LLM semantic analysis
METHODS:
  DetectLeakageAsync(artifacts: List<dict[str, Any]>, publisherTenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: leakageDetectionDepth: dropdown (shallow|deep|comprehensive)
MACHINE: Any cross-tenant reference = package rejection.
```

## FAMILY 202: Marketplace Listing & Discovery (F1356–F1364)
**Purpose:** Search, browse, rate, review, discover template packages. Fabric-first UI.

### F1356: IMarketplaceListingService
```
INTERFACE:  IMarketplaceListingService

FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch

  UpdateListingAsync(listingId: str, updates: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  SearchListingsAsync(query: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: featuredCategories: list, maxScreenshots: number, richDescriptionEnabled: bool
MACHINE: Listing requires published version. Search uses build_search_filter (DNA-2).
```

### F1357: IMarketplaceCategoryService
```
INTERFACE:  IMarketplaceCategoryService
PURPOSE:    Manage taxonomy of template categories and tags
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  GetCategoriesAsync() → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
  AssignCategoriesAsync(packageId: str, categoryIds: list[str], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  SuggestCategoriesAsync(manifest: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: allowCustomTags: bool, maxCategoriesPerPackage: number
MACHINE: AI-suggested categories via AI ENGINE FABRIC (optional).
```

### F1358: ITemplateRatingService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateRatingService
PURPOSE:    Collect and aggregate ratings/reviews from installing tenants
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  SubmitRatingAsync(packageId: str, rating: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  GetAggregateRatingAsync(packageId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: ratingScale: number (5|10), requireReviewText: bool, moderationEnabled: bool
MACHINE: One rating per tenant per version. Aggregate recalculated on each new rating.
```

### F1359: IMarketplaceSearchService
```
INTERFACE:  IMarketplaceSearchService
PURPOSE:    Full-text + faceted search with relevance ranking
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (BM25 + vector)
METHODS:
  SearchAsync(query: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
  GetFacetsAsync(query: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
  GetTrendingAsync(period: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: searchBoostFields: list, enableSemanticSearch: bool, resultsPerPage: number
MACHINE: build_search_filter (DNA-2). Scope: public + unlisted(direct link) + private(allowlisted).
```

### F1360: IMarketplaceFeaturedService
```
INTERFACE:  IMarketplaceFeaturedService
PURPOSE:    Curate featured/recommended templates
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  GetFeaturedAsync(category: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
  ComputeRecommendationsAsync(tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
FREEDOM: featuredRefreshInterval: duration, algorithmicFeaturedEnabled: bool
MACHINE: Recommendations never expose cross-tenant usage data.
```

### F1361: ITemplateCompatibilityService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateCompatibilityService
PURPOSE:    Check template compatibility with consumer environment
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  CheckCompatibilityAsync(packageId: str, semver: str, consumerTenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: strictCompatibilityCheck: bool
MACHINE: Incompatible installations blocked. Warning for optional deps.
```

```
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams

  SetNotificationPreferencesAsync(prefs: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: notificationChannels: multi-select, digestFrequency: dropdown

```

```
  GetAuditTrailAsync(filters: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
```

## FAMILY 203: Template Installation & Binding (F1365–F1373)
**Purpose:** Install templates into consumer tenants. Snapshot/Linked/Fork modes. Connector rebinding.

### F1365: ITemplateInstallationService
```
INTERFACE:  ITemplateInstallationService
PURPOSE:    Core installation orchestrator — Snapshot/Linked/Fork
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  InstallAsync(installRequest: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  ListInstallationsAsync(filters: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult<List<dict[str, Any]>>
  UninstallAsync(installationId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: defaultInstallMode: dropdown (snapshot|linked|fork), sandboxFirstRequired: bool
MACHINE: Install mode immutable. Linked maintains version pointer. Uninstall preserves run history.
```

### F1366: IDependencyValidationService
```
INTERFACE:  IDependencyValidationService
PURPOSE:    Validate consumer has required factories and entitlements
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  ValidateDependenciesAsync(manifest: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[ValidationResult]
FREEDOM: allowPartialInstall: bool
MACHINE: Missing required deps = blocked. Missing optional = warning.
```

### F1367: IConnectorRebindingService
```
INTERFACE:  IConnectorRebindingService
PURPOSE:    Wizard for rebinding connector credentials during installation
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams (async consent flows)
METHODS:
  StartRebindingAsync(installationId: str, requiredConnectors: List<dict[str, Any]>, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  SubmitBindingAsync(rebindingId: str, connectorId: str, binding: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: allowSkipOptionalConnectors: bool, oauthConsentTimeout: duration
MACHINE: Secrets NEVER in installation record — only secret_refs. OAuth consent per connector. Failed rebinding blocks install.
```

### F1368: IDatasetBindingService
```
INTERFACE:  IDatasetBindingService
PURPOSE:    Bind tenant-local datasets to template params
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  BindDatasetAsync(installationId: str, paramName: str, datasetRef: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: autoCreateNamespace: bool, validationDepth: dropdown
MACHINE: Dataset refs must point to tenant-owned storage only (DNA-5). Cross-tenant refs rejected.
```

### F1369: IInstanceCreationService
```
INTERFACE:  IInstanceCreationService
PURPOSE:    Create runnable instances from installations with bindings
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  CreateInstanceAsync(installationId: str, bindings: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  ActivateInstanceAsync(instanceId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  PauseInstanceAsync(instanceId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: maxInstancesPerInstallation: number
MACHINE: All required params bound before activation. Instances scoped to consumer tenant.
```

### F1370: IFlowCloneService
```
INTERFACE:  IFlowCloneService
PURPOSE:    Clone flow definitions from template into consumer tenant (Snapshot mode)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) + FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry))
METHODS:
  CloneFlowAsync(sourceFlowId: str, targetTenantId: str, paramBindings: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[str]
FREEDOM: preserveOriginalMetadata: bool, prefixClonedNames: bool
MACHINE: Cloned flows independent. All tenant IDs rewritten. Publisher data refs stripped.
```

### F1371: ILinkedInstallTrackerService
```
INTERFACE:  ILinkedInstallTrackerService
PURPOSE:    Track linked installations, version pointers, upstream changes
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  TrackInstallationAsync(installationId: str, packageId: str, semver: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  CheckForUpdatesAsync(installationId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: checkUpdateFrequency: duration
MACHINE: Runs pinned to installation's current version. Version pointer update = explicit action.
```

### F1372: IForkService
```
INTERFACE:  IForkService
PURPOSE:    Convert linked installation to fully local snapshot (break link)
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  ForkInstallationAsync(installationId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
FREEDOM: preserveForkMetadata: bool
MACHINE: Fork is irreversible. Becomes snapshot mode. Future upstream updates ignored.
```

### F1373: IInstallationMeteringService
```
INTERFACE:  IInstallationMeteringService
PURPOSE:    Emit metering events for installation lifecycle
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams
METHODS:
  EmitInstallEventAsync(event: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
  EmitUpgradeEventAsync(event: dict[str, Any], tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: additionalMeteringDimensions: list
MACHINE: Events include: packageId, publisherTenantId, consumerTenantId, installMode, semver. Bounded dims.
```

## FAMILY 204: Version Upgrade & Migration Engine (F1374–F1381)
**Purpose:** Upgrade linked installations safely. Diffs, migration plans, risk scores, rollback, BFA revalidation.

### F1374: IUpgradePlannerService
```
INTERFACE:  IUpgradePlannerService
PURPOSE:    Compute upgrade plan (diff + risk score + breaking changes)
FABRIC:     AI ENGINE FABRIC (SK-385 (IAiProvider)) → LLM for semantic diff
METHODS:
  PlanUpgradeAsync(installationId: str, targetVersion: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: riskThreshold: number, includeSemanticDiff: bool
MACHINE: Plan includes added/removed/modified steps, parameter changes, breaking changes.
```

### F1375: IFlowDiffEngineService
```
INTERFACE:  IFlowDiffEngineService
PURPOSE:    Compute structural diff between flow versions (DAG comparison)
FABRIC:     CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
METHODS:
  ComputeDiffAsync(from: dict[str, Any], to: dict[str, Any]) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: diffGranularity: dropdown (step|parameter|full)
MACHINE: Diff deterministic. Breaking changes: added-required-param, removed-step, changed-type.
```

### F1376: IMigrationExecutorService
```
INTERFACE:  IMigrationExecutorService
PURPOSE:    Execute upgrade migration (apply new version, rebind, validate)
FABRIC:     FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry)) → flow execution
METHODS:
  ExecuteMigrationAsync(planId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  GetMigrationStatusAsync(migrationId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: dryRunFirst: bool, applyToSandboxFirst: bool
MACHINE: Creates NEW local version (never overwrites). Old version runnable. In-flight runs pinned.
```

### F1377: IRollbackService
```
INTERFACE:  IRollbackService
PURPOSE:    Rollback failed migration to previous version
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
METHODS:
  RollbackAsync(migrationId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: autoRollbackOnFailure: bool, keepFailedVersionForDebugging: bool
MACHINE: Rollback restores version pointer — no data loss. Logged in audit trail.
```

### F1378: IBfaRevalidationService
```
INTERFACE:  IBfaRevalidationService
PURPOSE:    Run BFA cross-flow validation after upgrade
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (BFA indices)
METHODS:
  RevalidateAsync(installationId: str, newVersion: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: blockOnConflict: bool, conflictSeverityThreshold: dropdown
MACHINE: BFA revalidation mandatory on every upgrade (IRON RULE). Critical conflicts block upgrade.
```

### F1379: IParameterMigrationService
```
INTERFACE:  IParameterMigrationService
PURPOSE:    Map parameter bindings from old to new version schema
FABRIC:     CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
METHODS:
  MapParametersAsync(oldBindings: dict[str, Any], oldSchema: List<dict[str, Any]>, newSchema: List<dict[str, Any]>) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: autoMapByName: bool, autoMapByType: bool
MACHINE: Unmapped required params must be manually provided. Type mismatches = breaking changes.
```

### F1380: IStagedRolloutService
```
INTERFACE:  IStagedRolloutService
PURPOSE:    Apply upgrades staged: sandbox → staging → production
FABRIC:     FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry)) → flow execution
METHODS:
  StartStagedRolloutAsync(migrationId: str, stages: List<dict[str, Any]>, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[str]
  AdvanceStageAsync(rolloutId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: stages: list, autoAdvanceOnSuccess: bool, smokeTestRequired: bool
MACHINE: Production requires approval unless auto-advance + all tests pass.
```

### F1381: IUpgradeNotificationService
```
INTERFACE:  IUpgradeNotificationService
PURPOSE:    Notify consumer tenants about upgrades and migration results
FABRIC:     QUEUE FABRIC (SK-383 (RedisStreamQueue)) → Redis Streams
METHODS:
  NotifyUpgradeAvailableAsync(installationId: str, newVersion: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
FREEDOM: upgradeNotificationChannel: dropdown, includeChangelog: bool
MACHINE: Security patches always notified regardless of preferences.
```

```
MACHINE: PII examples auto-sanitized. Prompt IDs parameterized.
```

### F1386: IRagConnectorSpecService

```
INTERFACE:  IRagConnectorSpecService

FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch

```

### F1387: IRagMetadataSchemaExportService

```
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch

  ExportMetadataSchemaAsync(blueprintId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[dict[str, Any]]
FREEDOM: includeOptionalFields: bool

```

### F1388: IRagEvaluationBenchmarkService

```
FABRIC:     DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
```

```
  DecommissionIndexAsync(indexId: str, tenantId: str) → DataProcessResult[bool]
```

### F1407: IConnectorStubService
```
FABRIC: CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
PURPOSE: Stub connector implementations for sandbox
MACHINE: Never calls real APIs.
```

### F1408: ISandboxExecutionService
```
FABRIC: FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry)) → sandbox context
PURPOSE: Execute flows in sandbox with monitoring
MACHINE: No production data/connectors. Network egress restricted.
```

### F1409: ISandboxValidationService
```
FABRIC: CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
PURPOSE: Validate sandbox results against expectations
MACHINE: Report: pass/fail per step, timing, resource usage.
```

### F1410: ITryBeforeInstallService
```
FABRIC: FLOW ENGINE FABRIC (SK-392 (RagStrategyRegistry)) → sandbox
PURPOSE: "Try in sandbox" from marketplace
MACHINE: Trial runs NOT counted as installations. Synthetic data + stubs only.
```

## FAMILY 209: Data Pack Export & Import (F1411–F1415)
**Purpose:** Optional data sharing with explicit opt-in, PII scanning, provenance.

### F1411: IDataPackExportService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Export tenant data as paid artifact with PII scanning
MACHINE: Explicit opt-in. PII scan mandatory. Export classification gate.
```

### F1412: IDataPackImportService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Import data packs with validation and provenance
MACHINE: Consumer tenant scoped (DNA-5). Content hashes verified.
```

### F1413: IContentProvenanceService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Track data provenance (origin, transforms, lineage)
MACHINE: Provenance immutable. Content hashes at each step.
```

### F1414: IDataPackPricingService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Manage pricing for data packs (separate from templates)
MACHINE: Independent pricing. Higher isolation for runtime-influencing content.
```

### F1415: IIsolationTierService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Evaluate and enforce isolation tier for shared content
MACHINE: Data packs require minimum "bridge" tier. Checked at install.
```

---

## FAMILY 210: Template Supply Chain Security (F1416–F1418)
**Purpose:** Signing, SBOM, SLSA provenance attestations.

### F1416: IArtifactSigningService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch (signature store)
PURPOSE: Sign template artifacts (cosign-compatible)
MACHINE: Unsigned = cannot publish to public. Verification on install mandatory.
```

### F1417: ISbomGeneratorService
```
FABRIC: CORE FABRIC (SK-379 (MicroserviceBase)) → in-process
PURPOSE: Generate SPDX SBOM for packages
MACHINE: Auto-generated on publish. Lists all factory deps.
```

### F1418: IProvenanceAttestationService
```
FABRIC: DATABASE FABRIC (SK-382 (ElasticsearchDatabase)) → Elasticsearch
PURPOSE: Generate SLSA-aligned provenance attestations
MACHINE: Links package to build pipeline. Tamper-evident hash chain.
```
